patch_description: Propose parameter sharing for the center-edge CRX entangling gates to reduce the per-block parameter count and enforce symmetry. By reusing a single parameter across all four CRX gates that connect the center qubit (8) to the edge qubits (1,3,5,7), we decrease N_PARAMS_PER_BLOCK from 7 to 4 (3 RY params + 1 shared CRX param). This should improve generalization and training efficiency (fewer trainable parameters) while retaining the data-reuploading structure and adjacency constraints. The block remains expressive due to multiple center-edge entanglers using the same tunable strength, and symmetry is encouraged across the four connections.
